message:
chore(engine): sync concurrent agent changes to 5 source modules

Concurrent agent modifications:
- counterfactual_evaluator.rs: Refactored evaluation logic
- error_code.rs: Updated error code definitions
- extension_host_authority_guard.rs: Adjusted guard checks
- migration_kit.rs: Expanded migration kit with additional handlers
- mmr_proof.rs: Minor proof verification adjustments
